violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Tile floors in steam room noted in need of repair. Vent covers and ceiling in front food prep area noted in need of cleaning. Some ceiling tiles noted missing in production room. Floor by floor drain on production room noted in need of repairs.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Steam room vent filters ducts and hood noted in need of cleaning.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): Inadequate sanitizing with quaternary ammonia was noted in the three compartment sink.

INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): The building containing the food service was noted with a structure which would allow the entrance of insects and/ or rodents. Door sweep of the downstairs production room entrance door noted damaged.

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored in the production walk in cooler downstairs not covered. Dry bulk ingredient bins in the production room noted with lids open. some bulk dry ingredient bags noted left kept open after production was done and on the floor. Some food items noted being stored under missing or damaged ceiling tiles with evidence of water leaks.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Production food equipment downstairs noted not properly maintained.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor tiles in the bagel boiling area in the kitchen noted in need of repairs. Some ceiling tiles noted missing and/or with water damage in the downstairs production area. Floors walls and ceiling in the kitchen and production ares downstairs noted in need of cleaning.
LIGHTING (1 pts): Some lights in the downstairs production area noted without shields.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service noted being stored on the floor in the basement.
